example: I have an appointment at two o'clock.
The receptionist will help you when you call the doctor's office.
ja: 受付係、レセプショニスト

example: Maybe you have a fever if you feel hot.
The nurse might check your temperature with a thermometer.
The doctor listens to your heart with a stethoscope.
The doctor writes a prescription for medicine.
You take the prescription to the pharmacy to get medicine.
The doctor says you need to rest and drink water.
The doctor gives you medicine to help you get better.
I have a headache when my head hurts.
I have a sore throat and it hurts to eat.
The doctor said I have a cold because I sneeze a lot.
When you feel sad, you can talk to God through prayer.
Sometimes we feel sad in our heart.
Jesus can bring true and full joy to our heart.
